meaning: adj.显示努力的,充满努力的,需要努力的
examples: Inferential activity is likely only when consumers are motivated and able to engage in effortful cognitive processes.
This structured knowledge is built by years of effortful study.
It takes about ten years of effortful study to become an expert
Occasionally, she does a round of the street and casts us out one by one, which is effortful and very time-consuming.
